# Version 4.151.0 (Unreleased)
> **Perf and hex-parse work**

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 (unreleased) speeds up SKColor hex parsing and folds in an upstream m151 bug-fix sync.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Upstream chrome/m151 bug-fix sync** — The bundled engine picks up the latest upstream chrome/m151 fixes. ([#4312](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4312))

## API Surface

- **Faster SKColor hex parsing with ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads** — `SKColor.Parse`/`TryParse` gain `ReadOnlySpan<char>` overloads and skip allocations on the hot path, so slicing a color out of a larger string no longer needs a substring. ([#4345](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4345))
- **GRContextOptions cleanup** — The `unsafe` modifier on `GRContextOptions` is dropped — it wasn't needed for the fields it declared, so consumers can now use the type from `/unsafe`-disabled projects without a workaround. ([#3991](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3991))
